contents:
[package]
name = "cxx-qt"
version = "0.8.1"
edition = "2021"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "Safe interop between Rust and Qt"
repository = "https://github.com/KDAB/cxx-qt/"
homepage = "https://kdab.github.io/cxx-qt/book/"
readme = "README.md"
keywords = ["cxx", "ffi", "QML", "Qt"]
categories = ["api-bindings", "gui"]
rust-version = "1.85.0"
links = "cxx-qt"

[dependencies]
cxx = "1.0.176"
static_assertions = "1.1.0"
thiserror = "1.0"

[dependencies.cxx-qt-macro]
path = "crates/cxx-qt-macro"
version = "0.8.1"

[build-dependencies.cxx-qt-build]
path = "crates/cxx-qt-build"
version = "0.8.1"

[build-dependencies.qt-build-utils]
path = "crates/qt-build-utils"
version = "0.8.1"

[dev-dependencies]
cxx = "1.0.176"

[lints.clippy]
incompatible_msrv = "deny"
if_not_else = "warn"
manual_let_else = "warn"
redundant_else = "warn"
single_match_else = "warn"

[package]
name = "cxx-qt-build"
version = "0.8.1"
edition = "2021"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "Helpers for integrating `cxx-qt` crate into a Cargo build"
repository = "https://github.com/KDAB/cxx-qt/"
rust-version = "1.85.0"

[dependencies]
cxx-gen = "0.7.176"
proc-macro2 = "1.0"
quote = "1.0"
codespan-reporting = "0.11"
serde_json = "1.0"

[dependencies.cc]
version = "1.0.100"
features = ["parallel"]

[dependencies.cxx-qt-gen]
path = "crates/cxx-qt-gen"
version = "0.8.1"

[dependencies.qt-build-utils]
features = ["serde"]
path = "crates/qt-build-utils"
version = "0.8.1"

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0"
features = ["derive"]

[features]
link_qt_object_files = ["qt-build-utils/link_qt_object_files"]

[lints.clippy]
incompatible_msrv = "deny"
if_not_else = "warn"
manual_let_else = "warn"
redundant_else = "warn"
single_match_else = "warn"

[package]
name = "cxx-qt-gen"
version = "0.8.1"
edition = "2021"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "Code generation for integrating `cxx-qt` into higher level tools"
repository = "https://github.com/KDAB/cxx-qt/"
exclude = ["update_expected.sh"]
rust-version = "1.85.0"

[dependencies]
cxx-gen = "0.7.176"
proc-macro2 = "1.0"
quote = "1.0"
convert_case = "0.6.0"
clang-format = "0.3"
indoc = "2.0"

[dependencies.syn]
version = "2.0"
features = ["extra-traits", "full"]

[dev-dependencies]
pretty_assertions = "1.2"

[lints.clippy]
incompatible_msrv = "deny"
if_not_else = "warn"
manual_let_else = "warn"
redundant_else = "warn"
single_match_else = "warn"

[package]
name = "cxx-qt-lib"
version = "0.8.1"
edition = "2021"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "Qt types for integrating `cxx-qt` crate with `cxx`"
repository = "https://github.com/KDAB/cxx-qt/"
exclude = ["**/generate.sh"]
links = "cxx-qt-lib"
rust-version = "1.85.0"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true
rustdoc-args = ["--cfg", "docsrs"]

[dependencies]
cxx = "1.0.176"

[dependencies.cxx-qt]
path = "crates/cxx-qt"
version = "0.8.1"

[dependencies.bytes]
version = "1.4"
optional = true

[dependencies.chrono]
version = "0.4.27"
optional = true

[dependencies.http]
version = "1.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.rgb]
version = "0.8"
optional = true

[dependencies.time]
version = "0.3.20"
optional = true

[dependencies.url]
version = "2.3"
optional = true

[dependencies.uuid]
version = "1.1.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1"
features = ["derive"]
optional = true

[dependencies.image-v0-24]
version = "0.24"
optional = true
package = "image"
default-features = false

[dependencies.image-v0-25]
version = "0.25"
optional = true
package = "image"
default-features = false

[build-dependencies.cxx-qt-build]
path = "crates/cxx-qt-build"
version = "0.8.1"

[build-dependencies.qt-build-utils]
path = "crates/qt-build-utils"
version = "0.8.1"

[dev-dependencies]
serde_json = "1.0.135"

[features]
full = ["qt_full", "serde", "url", "uuid", "time", "rgb", "http", "chrono", "bytes", "image-v0-24", "image-v0-25"]
default = []
qt_full = ["qt_gui", "qt_qml", "qt_quickcontrols"]
qt_gui = []
qt_qml = []
qt_quickcontrols = []
bytes = ["dep:bytes"]
chrono = ["dep:chrono"]
http = ["dep:http"]
rgb = ["dep:rgb"]
time = ["dep:time"]
url = ["dep:url"]
serde = ["dep:serde"]
uuid = ["dep:uuid"]
image-v0-24 = ["dep:image-v0-24"]
image-v0-25 = ["dep:image-v0-25"]
link_qt_object_files = ["cxx-qt-build/link_qt_object_files"]

[lints.clippy]
incompatible_msrv = "deny"
if_not_else = "warn"
manual_let_else = "warn"
redundant_else = "warn"
single_match_else = "warn"

[package]
name = "cxx-qt-lib-extras"
version = "0.8.1"
edition = "2021"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "Extra Qt types for integrating `cxx-qt` crate with `cxx` that are not available in `cxx-qt-lib`"
repository = "https://github.com/KDAB/cxx-qt/"
links = "cxx-qt-lib-extras"
rust-version = "1.85.0"

[dependencies]
cxx = "1.0.176"

[dependencies.cxx-qt]
path = "crates/cxx-qt"
version = "0.8.1"

[dependencies.cxx-qt-lib]
features = ["qt_full"]
path = "crates/cxx-qt-lib"
version = "0.8.1"

[build-dependencies.cxx-qt-build]
path = "crates/cxx-qt-build"
version = "0.8.1"

[features]
default = []
link_qt_object_files = ["cxx-qt-build/link_qt_object_files"]

[lints.clippy]
incompatible_msrv = "deny"
if_not_else = "warn"
manual_let_else = "warn"
redundant_else = "warn"
single_match_else = "warn"

[package]
name = "cxx-qt-macro"
version = "0.8.1"
edition = "2021"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "A set of macros for Qt/C++ interop in Rust"
repository = "https://github.com/KDAB/cxx-qt/"
homepage = "https://kdab.github.io/cxx-qt/book/"
rust-version = "1.85.0"

[lib]
proc-macro = true

[dependencies]
proc-macro2 = "1.0"
quote = "1.0"

[dependencies.cxx-qt-gen]
path = "crates/cxx-qt-gen"
version = "0.8.1"

[dependencies.syn]
version = "2.0"
features = ["extra-traits", "full"]

[lints.clippy]
incompatible_msrv = "deny"
if_not_else = "warn"
manual_let_else = "warn"
redundant_else = "warn"
single_match_else = "warn"

[package]
name = "qt-build-utils"
version = "0.8.1"
edition = "2021"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "Build script helper for linking Qt libraries and using moc code generator. Intended to be used together with cc, cpp_build, or cxx_build"
repository = "https://github.com/KDAB/cxx-qt/"
rust-version = "1.85.0"

[dependencies]
anyhow = "1.0"
semver = "1.0"
thiserror = "1.0"

[dependencies.cc]
version = "1.0.100"
features = ["parallel"]

[dependencies.serde]
optional = true
version = "1.0"
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.dirs]
version = "6.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.reqwest]
version = "0.13.2"
features = ["blocking", "gzip", "deflate"]
optional = true

[dependencies.serde_json]
optional = true
version = "1.0"

[dependencies.sha2]
version = "0.10.9"
optional = true

[dependencies.tempfile]
version = "3.25.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.tar]
version = "0.4.44"
optional = true

[dependencies.flate2]
version = "1.1.9"
optional = true

[dependencies.qt-artifacts]
version = "0.1.6"
optional = true

[dependencies.qt-version]
version = "0.1.4"
optional = true

[dependencies.which]
version = "8.0.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.zip]
version = "7.2.0"
optional = true
default-features = false
features = ["deflate"]

[features]
default = ["qmake"]
link_qt_object_files = []
qmake = ["dep:which"]
qt_minimal = ["qt_version", "dep:serde", "serde/derive", "semver/serde", "dep:reqwest", "dep:sha2", "dep:tempfile", "dep:serde_json", "dep:flate2", "dep:tar", "dep:qt-artifacts", "dep:dirs", "dep:zip"]
qt_version = ["dep:qt-version"]
serde = ["dep:serde"]

[lints.clippy]
incompatible_msrv = "deny"
if_not_else = "warn"
manual_let_else = "warn"
redundant_else = "warn"
single_match_else = "warn"
